message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
  DividerBorderThickness 2
  DividerBorderColor #000000
  DividerBackgroundColor transparent
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  BorderColor #000000
  FontSize 22
}
skinparam sequenceDivider {
  FontSize 22
  FontStyle bold
}

participant "client application" as C
participant "kong" as K
participant "resource service" as R

== get token ==
C -> K : Post (provision_key etc.)
K --> C : return redirect url and token

== get resource ==
C -> K : Post (sending Host and Token)
activate K
K -> K : verify token
K -> R : Proxy, load balance...
activate R
R --> K
deactivate R
K --> C
deactivate K

== refresh token ==
C -> K : send refresh token and other info
K --> C : return token and refresh token

@enduml
```
